problem: What substrate allows silicon-level performance in fully flexible electronics?
hypothesis: What substrate allows silicon-level performance in fully flexible electronics? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Self-assembled. Self-assembled monolayer for surface functionalization directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Accelerated degradation study with 30 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
